assertion_results.text: The test change classification analysis is based on comparing base-branch and PR-branch file content (function additions, removals, assertion changes) — the structural and semantic assessment references test file content, not acceptance criteria or task requirements (constraint 1.18)

The Reductive Findings (lines 48-63) reference 'Base-branch version tested: qualifier variants returned as distinct entries' and show before/after assertion code. The Semantic Assessment (lines 40-46) references test behavior changes. The analysis is grounded in comparing base-branch and PR-branch file content (function counts, assertion text), not acceptance criteria.
